title: Antigravity SDK: Building a digital simulated world
summary: Google's Antigravity SDK enables creation of multi-agent social simulations with autonomous virtual avatars. A demonstration at Google I/O showed avatars of attendees interacting autonomously within a simulated space station environment.
writeup: This video covers Google's Antigravity SDK, a toolkit for building multi-agent social simulations populated by autonomous virtual avatars. It centers on a Google I/O demonstration in which avatars of attendees interacted autonomously inside a simulated space station environment. The key takeaway: the SDK targets virtualized, multi-agent worlds where AI agents act on their own rather than following scripted behavior.
